title: HEM Incense sticks RED ROSE Pack of 6 with DHS incense stick holder for Aromatherapy, Incense Spa, Yoga, Meditation, Healing, Spirituality and Relaxation…
features: Pack of 6 and each pack contains 20 sticks (Total 120 Sticks). Each natural stick burns for Average time 35 minutes

Manufactured in India. Hem provides traditionally luxury handcrafted incense in beautiful fragrant scents. Prepared using only the highest quality and purest of ingredients provided by nature, that are free from chemicals and are ethically sourced.
The sticks made of natural materials such as wood flour, resin and herbs are immersed in pure essential oil to ensure that the fragrance intensity of each incense stick is as strong as possible.
Incense sticks can be used for Aromatherapy, Spa, Yoga, Weddings, Reiki, Meditation, Healing, Sensual Therapy, Positivity, Relaxation and much more.
description: Indulge in the divine luxurious fragrance with classic notes of powdered roses mixed with the richness of woody undertones to experience the mystical scent of Hem’s Red Rose incense sticks. It is the perfect air-purifying fragrance that helps fight odor. This heavenly blend of hand-picked roses and woody herbs can be used to dispel negativity, induce relaxing sleep, spiritual strength, aromatherapy, and strengthen meditation practices, making for the perfect floral heaven.
